rounds.answer_a:
Pin Builder’s accessibility note advises: “When autocomplete results are available, use up and down arrows to review them, then press Enter to select.” For Explore Search, the guidance adds that “touch-device users can explore by touch or with swipe gestures” once suggestions appear, employing the same arrow-key review/Enter-to-choose workflow on keyboards. These instructions ensure keyboard users navigate suggestion lists via arrow keys before confirming with Enter, while mobile or tablet users rely on tactile exploration and swipes for selection. [1]

## References
1. Donna Schlachter, “Heroes, Heroines, and History: The History of Matrimonial Bureaus and Dating Agencies – with Giveaway,” interface accessibility description, accessed 15 Dec 2025.
